commands.name: code

options.name: --approve-plans
options.description:
Auto-approve all plans presented in the TUI without
prompting.

options.description:
Close the TUI after the first prompt
completes

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Prompt with instructions for the agent

options.name: --prompt-file
options.description: Path to a file containing the prompt

options.name: --read-allow
options.description:
Glob patterns for files allowed to be read
(comma-separated)

options.name: --read-disallow
options.description:
Glob patterns for files NOT allowed to be read
(comma-separated)

options.name: --reasoning
options.description:
Reasoning effort (off, low, medium, high, max). Default:
persona default

options.name: --tools-allow
options.description:
Tool names allowed to be used
(comma-separated)

options.name: --tools-disallow
options.description:
Tool names NOT allowed to be used
(comma-separated)

options.name: --write-allow
options.description:
Glob patterns for files allowed to be written
(comma-separated)

options.name: --write-disallow
options.description:
Glob patterns for files NOT allowed to be written
(comma-separated)

options.name: --yes-to-all
options.description:
Auto-approve all plans and select the first option for
questions. Free text and secret questions are still asked.
